title: What We Do
metaTitle: Home modifications for accessibility / safety challenges
metaDescription: Aging-In-Place Remodeling is your San Diego's premiere remodeler for any home modifications for accessibility / safety challenges.
content: We are your one-stop solution for accessibility and safety modifications. We serve homes, workplaces, and other locations with over 3,000 mobility and safety products available.
Operating across Southern California with San Diego and Riverside County offices, we've completed hundreds of projects ranging from small installations to major renovations.

Staff members receive specialized training for sensitive situations involving those with special needs. We handle diverse challenges including Parkinson's disease, ALS, muscular dystrophy, cancer, cerebral palsy, brain and spinal injuries, post-surgical recovery, and multiple sclerosis.
We are a fully licensed general contractor (CSLB #807715), insured, CAPS certified, with all products and services guaranteed.
